title: Winner + Shop Update Tomorrow
excerpt: The winner for the spot in Kelly Purkey's Sketchbook class is: Meghan : “My favourite word is "remember" and my Studio Calico username is mcmillan715. Thanks for a chance to win a spot in this class!” Congrats Meghan! Here's a…
body:
The winner for the spot in Kelly Purkey's Sketchbook class is:

Meghan:

“My favourite word is "remember" and my Studio Calico username is mcmillan715. Thanks for a chance to win a spot in this class!”

Congrats Meghan!

Here's a sneak of the layout I contributed to the class:

Remember, the last day to sign up for Sketchbook 4 is March 31.

For those who missed out on the travel kit from last time, this assortment will be up in the shop tomorrow at 9:30am Pacific time for $50. (International orders will have to pay an additional amount for shipping.) There is a limited quantity available. Last time they sold out very quickly. Thanks!
